_doc: Lifecycle registry for lane:security-surface dark-launch flags (Epic #3789 #3795). Every lane-created flag carries a lifecycle record from birth: created(ticket, default:off) -> canary -> flipped(100%, date) -> retire-by(flipped + N days). flag-lifecycle-lint fails CI when a flag past retire_by is still referenced; dark-not-flipped-inventory emits a standing G8 gauge over flags still dark/canary.
